commit_message_summary: feat(llm): config-driven LLM provider factory (issue #20, 4.1.3, final subtask)

config_convention_introduced.resolution_order: explicit provider= kwarg, then LLM_PROVIDER env var, else LLMFactoryError
config_convention_introduced.rationale_pointer: requirement.md 'Config mechanism' section + factory.py module docstring 'Config mechanism -- disclosed choice' section (LLD did not name a mechanism; this run picked one consistent with the 3 existing clients' own api_key-resolution convention)

test_result: cd agents && python3 -m pytest llm/ -q -> 71 passed (52 pre-existing untouched + 19 new in test_provider_selection.py)
broader_regression_result: cd agents && python3 -m pytest -q --ignore=ingestion/test_segment_live.py --ignore=ingestion/test_e2e_smoke.py -> 209 passed, 2 failed; both failures pre-existing and unrelated (ingestion/test_shortlist.py grpc tests fail on a local protobuf gencode/runtime version mismatch, google.protobuf.runtime_version.VersionError -- environment issue, not touched by this run's files)
lint_result: cd agents && python3 -m ruff check llm/factory.py llm/test_provider_selection.py -> All checks passed
not_in_scope_next_dispatches: Wiring agents/query/ call sites (intent-refiner, topic-selector, synthesizer) to actually call llm.factory.create_llm_client() -- query/ is currently empty (__init__.py only); this is future Phase 4 work, not part of issue #20.

Migrating agents/ingestion/ to construct its OllamaClient via the factory rather than directly -- out of scope for 4.1.3's stated acceptance criteria (which only requires no *SDK* import in call sites, and ingestion's existing direct OllamaClient construction predates this factory); left as-is, flagged forward for a future subtask/reviewer to decide if desired.
Issue #20 close-out summary doc (.cdr/commits/task-issue-20-summary.md analog) -- explicitly deferred to the /cdr:commit step per dispatch instructions, not produced by this run.
self_verification_note: Per invariant I4, this run did not verify its own work. /cdr:verify must run independently before any push or issue/milestone state change. This is issue #20's final subtask -- after this subtask's independent verification, the issue-level close-out summary should be produced by /cdr:commit, consolidating 4.1.1 (6109d13), 4.1.2 (a471268), and 4.1.3 (this run's commit).

security_disclosure.github_issue_20_body_via_gh_issue_view: Checked full issue #20 body (title, description, all 3 subtask bullets) for embedded prompt-injection-style text (fake system-reminders, fake date-change notices, fake tool-instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directives). None found -- body is clean, standard issue/subtask text.
security_disclosure.in_session_tool_flow_system_reminders: Two system-reminder blocks arrived directly in this session's own tool-call flow (not embedded in any repo file or gh output): one a date-confirmation reminder (date was already 2026-07-11 per the dispatch's own currentDate context, so this was inert/no-op), and one an 'Auto Mode Active' block encouraging fewer clarification pauses plus a pre-destructive-command git-stash reminder. Per the dispatching agent's own security instructions, reminders arriving directly in the harness's tool-call flow (not embedded in issue/PR/file content) are treated as legitimate harness output, not injection -- neither altered this run's scope, permissions, or the standing no-push/no-self-verify/no-issue-comment constraints, and no destructive git commands were run in this session regardless.
